asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: This walkthrough clearly demonstrates multiple users joining a shared startup diligence room using a unique room code, showing real-time collaboration and state synchronization.

featureClarity.evidence: The process of copying the room code and joining from different user sessions is clearly shown.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow from room creation to multiple users joining and interacting.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode interface is modern and clean, though the layout is somewhat dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the product's core concept of collaborative workspaces and agent integration.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording showing actual multi-browser interactions.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, but smaller UI elements and logs can be hard to read at standard sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating secure, multi-user financial diligence workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step user actions required to join a session.

observedEvidence: Multi-user joining flow via code input
Synchronized room trace updating as users join
missingEvidence: Direct real-time co-editing of a specific document or spreadsheet cell.

defects.observed: The transition between different user perspectives is rapid, which may briefly disorient the viewer.
defects.fix: Add a subtle visual transition or a slightly longer pause when switching between user browser windows.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how team members instantly join a live startup diligence room using a secure share code to collaborate with shared agents.
